name: Guardian
tagline: Draw enemy attention and punish those who ignore you.

baseAbility.name: Patrol
baseAbility.description: Standard action (or a move action with talents). Designate your threatened area as a patrol until the start of your next turn. While patrolling, you may move within that area on other creatures' turns without provoking, and you gain a delayed damage pool: some damage you'd take can instead be stored and unleashed later against a foe by expending martial focus. You also gain one Guardian package of your choice (such as Challenge, which lets you mark a foe who suffers penalties for attacking anyone but you).

talents.name: Defend Other
talents.description: As an immediate action, grant an adjacent ally a bonus to AC against a single attack by placing yourself partly in harm's way.

talents.name: I Will Hear
talents.description: Allies can call out to you as a swift action from anywhere on the battlefield; you always know the direction and rough distance to a calling ally.

talents.name: Swift Guardian
talents.description: Reduce the action needed to start a patrol by one step, eventually down to a free action.

talents.name: Additional Package
talents.description: Gain another Guardian package you don't already possess.

talents.name: Cold Iron Call
talents.description: Your delayed damage pool can also store certain harmful conditions (like poison) instead of just raw damage, to be inflicted later.

talents.name: Durable
talents.description: Increase the maximum amount of damage your delayed damage pool can hold.

talents.name: Zone Package
talents.description: Gain a (zone) talent - an effect that applies to your whole patrolled area rather than a single target.

talents.name: Challenge Package
talents.description: Base package: mark a foe as your challenge target; they take a penalty when attacking or casting to affect anyone but you while marked.

talents.name: Rapid Response
talents.description: Advanced option: teleport to an ally who calls for help via I Will Hear, bringing along nearby allies and gear, at the cost of exhaustion afterward.

talents.name: Guardian's Resolve
talents.description: Share AC bonuses from fighting defensively or total defense with allies inside your patrolled area.
